name: ScheduledMsg
description: Send messages once at a future time or on a recurring schedule (interval / daily / weekly). Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing ScheduledMsg!

Load it with `[p]load scheduledmsg`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-server scheduled message configuration (content and timing). It does not persistently store personal data about users.
